body_html:
send photos

--- LaurenPtr@aol.com wrote:

Jeffrey

Hi Hope all is going great for you. Kristina
decided at the last minute not
to go to the Classic. I was really looking forward
to seeing you.
Everything is going good here. I am keeping really
busy with my photography studio,
and I am building a house. It would be great to see
you sometime, it has been
so long. I don't think I ever had the chance to tell
you what an amazing man
you are and how privileged I feel to have met you.
Hope your having fun
whatever your doing!

Lots of Love
Lauren

P. S. Sorry it took me a few days to write back, I
only check my email every
few days.
